verses.geez:
ወአፍቅሮ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክከ ፡ ወዕቀብ ፡ ሕጎ ፡ ወኵነኔሁ ፡ ወትእዛዞ ፡ ወፍትሖ ፡ በኵሉ ፡ መዋዕለ ፡
                  ሕይወትከ ።

translations.lxx: Therefore thou shalt love the Lord thy God, and shalt observe his appointments, and his ordinances, and his commandments, and his judgments, always.
translations.kjv: Therefore thou shalt love the LORD thy God, and keep his charge, and his statutes, and his judgments, and his commandments, alway.

verses.geez:
ወታእምሩ ፡ ዮም ፡ ከመ ፡ አኮ ፡ ደቂቅክሙ ፡ ዘርእዩ ፡ ወአእመሩ ፡ ተግሣጾ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክከ ፡ ወዐቢያቲሁ
                  ፡ ወእድ ፡ ጽንዕት ፡ ወመዝራዕት ፡ ልዑል ፤

translations.lxx: And ye shall know this day; for I speak not to your children, who know not and have not seen the discipline of the Lord thy God, and his wonderful works, and his strong hand, and his high arm,
translations.kjv: And know ye this day: for I speak not with your children which have not known, and which have not seen the chastisement of the LORD your God, his greatness, his mighty hand, and his stretched out arm,

verses.geez: ወተአምሪሁ ፡ ወመድምሙ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘገብረ ፡ በማእከለ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወበፈርዖን ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወበኵሉ ፡ ምድሩ ፤

translations.lxx: and his miracles, and his wonders, which he wrought in the midst of Egypt on Pharao king of Egypt, and all his land;
translations.kjv: And his miracles, and his acts, which he did in the midst of Egypt unto Pharaoh the king of Egypt, and unto all his land;

verses.geez:
ወኵሎ ፡ ዘገብረ ፡ በኀይሎሙ ፡ ለግብጽ ፡ ወበሰረገላቲሆሙ ፡ ወበአፍራሲሆሙ ፡ ዘከመ ፡ ከደኖሙ ፡ ማየ ፡ ባሕረ ፡ ኤርትራ
                  ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ገጾሙ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይዴግኑክሙ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ እምድኅሬክሙ ፡ ወአጥፍኦሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክክሙ ፡ እስከ ፡ ዛቲ
                  ፡ ዕለት ፤

translations.lxx: and what he did to the host of the Egyptians, and to their chariots, and their cavalry, and their host; how he made the water of the Red Sea to overwhelm the face of them as they pursued after you, and the Lord destroyed them until this day;
translations.kjv: And what he did unto the army of Egypt, unto their horses, and to their chariots; how he made the water of the Red sea to overflow them as they pursued after you, and how the LORD hath destroyed them unto this day;

verses.geez: ወኵሎ ፡ ዘገብረ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ በገዳም ፡ እስከ ፡ በጻሕክሙ ፡ ዘንተ ፡ መካነ ፤

translations.lxx: and all the things which he did to you in the wilderness until ye came into this place;
translations.kjv: And what he did unto you in the wilderness, until ye came into this place;

verses.geez:
ወኵሎ ፡ ዘገብረ ፡ በዳታን ፡ ወበአቢሮን ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ኤልያብ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ሮቤል ፡ እንተ ፡ ፈትሐት ፡ ምድር ፡ አፉሃ ፡
                  ወውሕጠቶሙ ፡ ወለአብያቲሆሙ ፡ ወለደባትሪሆሙ ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡ ንዋዮሙ ፡ ዘምስሌሆሙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ማእከሎሙ ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: and all things that he did to Dathan and Abiron the sons of Eliab the son of Ruben, whom the earth opening her mouth swallowed up, and their houses, and their tents, and all their substance that was with them, in the midst of all Israel:
translations.kjv: And what he did unto Dathan and Abiram, the sons of Eliab, the son of Reuben: how the earth opened her mouth, and swallowed them up, and their households, and their tents, and all the substance that was in their possession, in the midst of all Israel:

verses.geez: እስመ ፡ አዕይንቲክሙ ፡ ርእያ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ግብረ ፡ ዐቢያተ ፡ ዘገብረ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: for your eyes have seen all the mighty works of the Lord, which he wrought among you to-day.
translations.kjv: But your eyes have seen all the great acts of the LORD which he did.

verses.geez:
ወዕቀቡ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ትእዛዞ ፡ ዘአነ ፡ እኤዝዘከ ፡ ዮም ፡ ከመ ፡ ትሕየዉ ፡ ወትትባዝኁ ፡ ወትባኡ ፡ ትትዋረሱ ፡ ምድረ ፡
                  እንተ ፡ ላቲ ፡ ተዐድዉ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፡ ከመ ፡ ትትዋረስዋ ፡ በህየ ፤

translations.lxx: And ye shall keep all his commandments, as many as I command thee to-day, that ye may live, and be multiplied, and that ye may go in and inherit the land, into which ye go across Jordan to inherit it:
translations.kjv: Therefore shall ye keep all the commandments which I command you this day, that ye may be strong, and go in and possess the land, whither ye go to possess it;

verses.geez:
ከመ ፡ ይኑኅ ፡ መዋዕሊክሙ ፡ በውስተ ፡ ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ መሐለ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለአበዊክሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ የሀቦሙ ፡
                  ወለዘርኦሙ ፡ እምድኅሬሆሙ ፡ ምድረ ፡ እንተ ፡ ትውሕዝ ፡ ሐሊበ ፡ ወመዓረ ።

translations.lxx: that ye may live long upon the land, which the Lord sware to your fathers to give to them, and to their seed after them, a land flowing with milk and honey.
translations.kjv: And that ye may prolong your days in the land, which the LORD sware unto your fathers to give unto them and to their seed, a land that floweth with milk and honey.

verses.geez:
ወከመዝ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ ትበውእ ፡ ህየ ፡ ትትወረሳ ፡ አኮ ፡ ከመ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ እንተ ፡
                  እምኔሃ ፡ ወፃእከ ፡ ዘሶበ ፡ ዘይዘርኡ ፡ ዘርአ ፡ ይሰቅዩ ፡ በእገሪሆሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ ዐጸደ ፡ ኀምል ።

translations.lxx: For the land into which thou goest to inherit it, is not as the land of Egypt, whence ye came out, whensoever they sow the seed, and water it with their feet, as a garden of herbs:
translations.kjv: For the land, whither thou goest in to possess it, is not as the land of Egypt, from whence ye came out, where thou sowedst thy seed, and wateredst it with thy foot, as a garden of herbs:

verses.geez:
ወምድርሰ ፡ እንተ ፡ ህየ ፡ ትበውእ ፡ ከመ ፡ ትትዋረሳ ፡ ምድር ፡ ይእቲ ፡ እንተ ፡ ባቲ ፡ አድባረ ፡ ወአምዳረ ፡
                  ወእምነ ፡ ዝናመ ፡ ሰማይ ፡ ትሰቀይ ፡ ማየ ፤

translations.lxx: but the land into which thou goest to inherit it, is a land of mountains and plains; it shall drink water of the rain of heaven.
translations.kjv: But the land, whither ye go to possess it, is a land of hills and valleys, and drinketh water of the rain of heaven:

verses.geez:
ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ ዘልፈ ፡ ይኄውጻ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክከ ፡ ወአዕይንቲሁ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክከ ፡ ላዕሌሃ ፡
                  እምርእሰ ፡ ዓመት ፡ እስከ ፡ ማኅለቅቱ ፡ ለዓመት ።

translations.lxx: A land which the Lord thy God surveys continually, the eyes of the Lord thy God are upon it from the beginning of the year to the end of the year.
translations.kjv: A land which the LORD thy God careth for: the eyes of the LORD thy God are always upon it, from the beginning of the year even unto the end of the year.

verses.geez:
ወለእመሰ ፡ ሰሚዐ ፡ ሰማዕክሙ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ትእዛዘ ፡ ዘአነ ፡ እኤዝዘክሙ ፡ ዮም ፡ ከመ ፡ ታፍቅሮ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡
                  አምላክከ ፡ ወታምልኮ ፡ በኵሉ ፡ ልብከ ፡ ወበኵሉ ፡ ነፍስከ ፤

translations.lxx: Now if ye will indeed hearken to all the commands which I charge thee this day, to love the Lord thy God, and to serve him with all thy heart, and with all thy soul,
translations.kjv: And it shall come to pass, if ye shall hearken diligently unto my commandments which I command you this day, to love the LORD your God, and to serve him with all your heart and with all your soul,

verses.geez:
ወይሁብ ፡ ዝናሞ ፡ በበ ፡ መዋዕሊሁ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ምድርክሙ ፡ ዘነግህኒ ፡ ወዘሰርክኒ ፡ ወአስተጋቢአከ ፡ እክለከ ፡
                  ወወይነከ ፡ ወቅብአከ ፤

translations.lxx: then he shall give to thy land the early and latter rain in its season, and thou shalt bring in thy corn, and thy wine, and thine oil.
translations.kjv: That I will give you the rain of your land in his due season, the first rain and the latter rain, that thou mayest gather in thy corn, and thy wine, and thine oil.

verses.geez: ይሁብ ፡ ሣዕረ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገዳምከ ፡ ለእንስሳከ ፡ ወተበልዕ ፡ ወትጸግብ ።

translations.lxx: And he shall give food in thy fields to thy cattle; and when thou hast eaten and art full,
translations.kjv: And I will send grass in thy fields for thy cattle, that thou mayest eat and be full.

verses.geez: ወዑቅ ፡ ባሕቱ ፡ ኢታሥብሑ ፡ ልበክሙ ፡ ወትክሐዱ ፡ ወትሑሩ ፡ ወታምልኩ ፡ ባዕደ ፡ አማልክተ ፡ ወትስግዱ ፡ ሎሙ ።

translations.lxx: take heed to thyself that thy heart be not puffed up, and ye transgress, and serve other gods, and worship them:
translations.kjv: Take heed to yourselves, that your heart be not deceived, and ye turn aside, and serve other gods, and worship them;

verses.geez:
ወይትመዓዕ ፡ በመዐት ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ላዕሌክሙ ፡ ወየዐጽዋ ፡ ለሰማይ ፡ ወኢይመጽእ ፡ ዝናም ፡ ወምድርኒ ፡ ኢትሁብ ፡
                  ፍሬሃ ፡ ወትጠፍኡ ፡ ፍጡነ ፡ እምነ ፡ ምድር ፡ ቡርክት ፡ እንተ ፡ ወሀበክሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: and the Lord be angry with you, and restrain the heaven; and there shall not be rain, and the earth shall not yield its fruit, and ye shall perish quickly from off the good land, which the Lord has given you.
translations.kjv: And then the LORD’s wrath be kindled against you, and he shut up the heaven, that there be no rain, and that the land yield not her fruit; and lest ye perish quickly from off the good land which the LORD giveth you.

verses.geez:
ወዕቀብዎ ፡ ለዝንቱ ፡ ነገር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ልብክሙ ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ነፍስክሙ ፡ ወረስይዎ ፡ ተአምረ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴክሙ ፡
                  ወይኩን ፡ ዘኢይትኀወስ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ አዕይንቲክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall store these words in your heart and in your soul, and ye shall bind them as a sign on your hand, and it shall be fixed before your eyes.
translations.kjv: Therefore shall ye lay up these my words in your heart and in your soul, and bind them for a sign upon your hand, that they may be as frontlets between your eyes.

verses.geez:
ወመርዎ ፡ ለደቂቅክሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይትናገሩ ፡ ቦቱ ፡ ለእመ ፡ ነበሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቤት ፡ ወለእመኒ ፡ ሖሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፍኖት
                  ፡ ወሶበኒ ፡ ትሰክብ ፡ ወሶበ ፡ ትትነሣእኒ ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall teach them to your children, so as to speak about them when thou sittest in the house, and when thou walkest by the way, and when thou sleepest, and when thou risest up.
translations.kjv: And ye shall teach them your children, speaking of them when thou sittest in thine house, and when thou walkest by the way, when thou liest down, and when thou risest up.

verses.geez: ወጸሐፍዎ ፡ ውስተ ፡ መርፈቀ ፡ ኆኅተ ፡ ቤትክሙ ፤

translations.lxx: And ye shall write them on the lintels of your houses, and on your gates;
translations.kjv: And thou shalt write them upon the door posts of thine house, and upon thy gates:

verses.geez:
ከመ ፡ ይብዛኅ ፡ መዋዕሊክሙ ፡ ወመዋዕለ ፡ ውሉድክሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ መሐለ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለአበዊክሙ ፡
                  ከመ ፡ የሀቦሙ ፡ በአምጣነ ፡ መዋዕለ ፡ ሰማይ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድር ።

translations.lxx: that your days may be long, and the days of your children, upon the land which the Lord sware to your fathers to give to them, as the days of heaven upon the earth.
translations.kjv: That your days may be multiplied, and the days of your children, in the land which the LORD sware unto your fathers to give them, as the days of heaven upon the earth.

verses.geez:
ወለእመ ፡ ሰሚዐ ፡ ሰማዕክሙ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ትእዛዘ ፡ ዘአነ ፡ እኤዝዘክሙ ፡ ዮም ፡ ከመ ፡ ትግበሩ ፡ ወታፍቅርዎ ፡
                  ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክክሙ ፡ ወከመ ፡ ትሑሩ ፡ በኵሉ ፡ ፍናዊሁ ፡ ወከመ ፡ ትትልውዎ ፤

translations.lxx: And it shall come to pass that if ye will indeed hearken to all these commands, which I charge thee to observe this day, to love the Lord our God, and to walk in all his ways, and to cleave close to him;
translations.kjv: For if ye shall diligently keep all these commandments which I command you, to do them, to love the LORD your God, to walk in all his ways, and to cleave unto him;

verses.geez:
ወያ[ወ]ጽኦሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለእሉ ፡ አሕዛብ ፡ እምቅድመ ፡ ገጽክሙ ፡ ወትትወረስዎሙ ፡ ለአሕዛብ ፡ ዐበይት ፡ እለ ፡
                  ይጸንዑ ፡ ፈድፋደ ፡ እምኔክሙ ።

translations.lxx: then the Lord shall cast out all these nations before you, and ye shall inherit great nations and stronger than yourselves.
translations.kjv: Then will the LORD drive out all these nations from before you, and ye shall possess greater nations and mightier than yourselves.

verses.geez:
ወኵሎ ፡ መካነ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ኬዶ ፡ አሰረ ፡ እገሪክሙ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ እምነ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ወአንጢሊባኖን ፡ ወእምነ ፡
                  ፈለግ ፡ ዐቢይ ፡ [ኤ]ፍራጥስ ፡ ወእስከ ፡ ባሕር ፡ እንተ ፡ መንገለ ፡ ዐረብ ፡ ይከውን ፡ ደወልክሙ ።

translations.lxx: Every place whereon the sole of your foot shall tread shall be yours; from the wilderness and Antilibanus, and from the great river, the river Euphrates, even as far as the west sea shall be your coasts.
translations.kjv: Every place whereon the soles of your feet shall tread shall be yours: from the wilderness and Lebanon, from the river, the river Euphrates, even unto the uttermost sea shall your coast be.

verses.geez:
ወአልቦ ፡ መኑሂ ፡ ዘይትቃወም ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ገጽክሙ ፡ ወይወዲ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ፍርሀተክሙ ፡ ወርዕደተክሙ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ገጸ
                  ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ ዐረግሙ ፡ ላዕሌሃ ፡ በከመ ፡ ይቤለክሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: No one shall stand before you; and the Lord your God will put the fear of you and the dread of you on the face of all the land, on which ye shall tread, as he told you.
translations.kjv: There shall no man be able to stand before you: for the LORD your God shall lay the fear of you and the dread of you upon all the land that ye shall tread upon, as he hath said unto you.

verses.geez: ወናሁ ፡ አነ ፡ ዮም ፡ ኣቀውም ፡ ቅድሜክሙ ፡ በረከተ ፡ ወመርገመ ፤

translations.lxx: Behold, I set before you this day the blessing and the curse;
translations.kjv: Behold, I set before you this day a blessing and a curse;

verses.geez: በረከትሰ ፡ ለእመ ፡ ሰማዕክሙ ፡ ትእዛዞ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክክሙ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘአነ ፡ እኤዝዘክሙ ፡ ዮም ፤

translations.lxx: the blessing, if ye hearken to the commands of the Lord your God, all that I command you this day;
translations.kjv: A blessing, if ye obey the commandments of the LORD your God, which I command you this day:

verses.geez:
[ወመርገምሰ ፡ ለእመ ፡ ኢሰማዕክሙ ፡ ትእዛዞ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክክሙ ፡ ዘአነ ፡ እኤዝዘክሙ ፡ ዮም ፡] ወኀደግምዋ
                  ፡ ለፍኖት ፡ እንተ ፡ አነ ፡ እኤዝዘክሙ ፡ ዮም ፡ ወሖርክሙ ፡ ወአምለክሙ ፡ ባዕደ ፡ አማልክተ ፡ ዘኢታአምሩ ።

translations.lxx: and the curse, if ye do not hearken to the commands of the Lord our God, as many as I command you this day, and ye wander from the way which I have commanded you, having gone to serve other gods, which ye know not.
translations.kjv: And a curse, if ye will not obey the commandments of the LORD your God, but turn aside out of the way which I command you this day, to go after other gods, which ye have not known.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ አብአከ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክከ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ ላቲ ፡ ተዐዱ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፡ ከመ ፡ ትትወረሳ
                  ፡ በህየ ፡ ወታገብእ ፡ በረከተ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ደብረ ፡ ጋሪዝን ፡ ወመርገመ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ደብረ ፡ ጌባል ፤

translations.lxx: And it shall come to pass when the Lord thy God shall have brought thee into the land into which thou goest over to inherit it, then thou shalt put blessing on mount Garizin, and the curse upon mount Gæbal.
translations.kjv: And it shall come to pass, when the LORD thy God hath brought thee in unto the land whither thou goest to possess it, that thou shalt put the blessing upon mount Gerizim, and the curse upon mount Ebal.

verses.geez:
እለ ፡ ሀለዉ ፡ ማዕዶተ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፡ ድኅረ ፡ ፍኖት ፡ ዛመንገለ ፡ ዐረበ ፡ ፀሐይ ፡ በምድረ ፡ ከናአን ፡ እለ ፡
                  ሀለዉ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዐረባ ፡ ምእኃዘ ፡ ጎልጎል ፡ ቅሩበ ፡ ዕፀት ፡ ነዋኅ ።

translations.lxx: Lo! are not these beyond Jordan, behind, westward in the land of Chanaan, which lies westward near Golgol, by the high oak?
translations.kjv: Are they not on the other side Jordan, by the way where the sun goeth down, in the land of the Canaanites, which dwell in the champaign over against Gilgal, beside the plains of Moreh?

verses.geez:
ወናሁ ፡ ተዐድውዎ ፡ ለድርዳንስ ፡ አንትሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ ትባኡ ፡ ትትወረስዋ ፡ ለምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ ይሁበክሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር
                  ፡ አምላክክሙ ፡ መክፈልተክሙ ፡ በኵሉ ፡ መዋዕል ፡ ወትነብሩ ፡ ውስቴታ ።

translations.lxx: For ye are passing over Jordan, to go in and inherit the land, which the Lord our God gives you to inherit always, and ye shall dwell in it.
translations.kjv: For ye shall pass over Jordan to go in to possess the land which the LORD your God giveth you, and ye shall possess it, and dwell therein.

verses.geez: ወዕቀቡ ፡ ከመ ፡ ትግበሩ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ትእዛዞ ፡ ወፍትሖ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ዘአነ ፡ እሁበክሙ ፡ ቅድሜክሙ ፡ ዮም ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall take heed to do all his ordinances, and these judgments, as many as I set before you to-day.
translations.kjv: And ye shall observe to do all the statutes and judgments which I set before you this day.
